name: Roaring Blood and Sand
descriptionTemplate: Increase a chosen Awakener's Aliemus by [Arg2]. Gain [Arg3] {STR}. If the Realm includes {Caro}, consume 10% of your HP to increase {Embryo Fusion} by +[Arg4]%.
lore:
Crimson twilight, swirling sand.

Upon the boundless dunes, a warrior born without hesitation bites into his wrist, returning his blood to the sky and earth.
